3616009281.title: Camping, hiking, first aid blanket, hiking, anti heat equipment, portable aluminum film life blanket,
3616009281.detail_text: Emergency Mylar Thermal Blanket Foil Space Blanket Designed for NASA Body Warmer Blanket Outdoor First Aid Camping Hiking Travel Feature: 1. The first aid blanket can be used as a reflective film to signal the rescuers. 2. In rainy days, the first aid blanket can be used as a poncho; it can be propped up as a canopy. 3. In summer, when parking under direct sunlight, use the first aid blanket to cover the front windshield of the car, which can reduce the heat absorption inside the car. 4. When used in low temperature environment, it can keep 80% of its own heat not to be emitted, and the strong reflection makes it easier for the rescue personnel to find, which is actually a wilderness survival tool. Specification: Size: Unfolded: 130*210cm/51.18*82.68in Material: PET film + coating Weight: 65g/pcQuantity: 4pcs /packet Color: Silver/Gold

Feature:

1. The first aid blanket can be used as a reflective film to signal the rescuers.

13634600778.title: ​​2PCS Emergency Survival Blankets - 160x210cm Heavy Duty Thermal Insulation for Camping, Hiking & Survival​
13634600778.detail_text: Application scenarios : 1. After an accident occurs, the body can be covered with a first aid blanket to prevent a decrease in body temperature; 2. If the vehicle breaks down in cold areas or at night, a first aid blanket can be used to keep the body warm; 3. The emergency blanket can be used as a reflective film to send signals to rescuers; 4. On rainy days, first aid blankets can be used as raincoats; Can be extended to make a canopy; 5. Parking under direct sunlight in summer, covering the car's front windshield with a first aid blanket can reduce heat absorption inside the car; 6. Putting a first aid blanket in the sleeping bag is very good for keeping warm; 7. Other suitable occasions.
13634600778.detail_html:

7. Other suitable occasions.

aiTexts: This LAZALAI Waterproof Summer Bucket Hat features lightweight, breathable polyester fabric with a 7 cm brim for effective sun protection.
Designed for outdoor use, it offers waterproof, anti-UV, and quick-drying properties, ideal for camping, hiking, and travel.
Adjustable cap circumference (55-60 cm) ensures a comfortable fit for adults.
Foldable and portable, it includes a storage bag for easy carrying and convenience on the go.

Color:7 color, As Shown

Description:

Simple and classic,Waterproof, shade and sunscreen, comfortable and breathable, skin-friendly.

The hat is very light,fashionable and versatile, adjustable, foldable at will, and good sun protection when traveling.

Storage Bag design,Easy to store and carry.

Easy to carry and comfortable, it presents an ideal wearing experience and is an indispensable trendy and fashionable match for travel.

Package includes: 1*Waterproof Bucket Hat

13776177680.title: Sports Kettle Buckle Silicone Water Bottle Carrier Ring with Metal Keychain Clip – Portable Sports Kettle Holder Buckle for Camping Hiking Outdoor Activities Easy to Carry and Durable
13776177680.detail_text: Description: Our sports kettle buckle is the perfect for all your outdoor activities like hiking, camping, and traveling. Its compact and lightweight design makes it easy to carry without taking up valuable backpack space. Featuring a sturdy metal keychain clip and a durable silicone carrier, this buckle securely holds heavy water bottles, soda bottles, kettles, and more. It easily attaches to bicycles, motorcycles, backpacks, and other gear, freeing your hands for other tasks. Versatile and reliable, this bottle holder is an essential tool for anyone on the go who needs quick and secure access to their drinks. Easy to use and built to last! Item Name: Sports Kettle Buckle Material: Silicone, Metal Features: Compact Size, Lightweight, Wear Resistant Notes: Due to the light and screen setting difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. Please allow slight dimension difference due to different manual measurement. Package Includes: 1 x Sports Kettle Buckle

product.desc:
Description:
Our sports kettle buckle is the perfect for all your outdoor activities like hiking, camping, and traveling. Its compact and lightweight design makes it easy to carry without taking up valuable backpack space. Featuring a sturdy metal keychain clip and a durable silicone carrier, this buckle securely holds heavy water bottles, soda bottles, kettles, and more. It easily attaches to bicycles, motorcycles, backpacks, and other gear, freeing your hands for other tasks. Versatile and reliable, this bottle holder is an essential tool for anyone on the go who needs quick and secure access to their drinks. Easy to use and built to last!
Item Name: Sports Kettle Buckle
Material: Silicone, Metal
Features: Compact Size, Lightweight, Wear Resistant

Notes:
Due to the light and screen setting difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. Please allow slight dimension difference due to different manual measurement.

Package Includes:
1 x Sports Kettle Buckle
product.highlights:
Compact and lightweight design makes it easy to carry without taking up space in your backpack or luggage.
Made from premium silicone for excellent durability, elasticity, and wear resistance.
Sturdy and finely crafted to prevent deformation or breakage during outdoor activities.
Perfect for hiking, camping, mountaineering, and traveling to keep your bottles securely attached.
Universal compatibility fits various bottle types including kettles, water bottles, and mineral water bottles.

3349725167.title: Mini LED Flashlight 1000LM USB Rechargeable COB Work Lights IPX4 Waterproof Keychain Light Lantern for Outdoor Camping Hiking
3349725167.detail_text: Specification: 【Lamp beads】: Double-sided C0B + XPG top light 【Product Size】:73*46*25mm 【Net Weight】:58g 【Material】:Aluminum alloy + PC 【Battery】: Built-in polymer battery 800mAh 【Charging mode】:Type-c fast charging 【Gear】:Left light on - right light on - top light on - three lights at the same time - three lights burst flash 【Features】: Top mountaineering buckle + bottle opener Bottom large strong magnet + standard bracket screws 【Waterproof grade】: IPX4 【Lumens】: Double light high brightness-1000LM 【Package Includes】: Keychain light + charging cable + color box Why does the light become weak? Key light working condition lasts about a few minutes after the intervention due to temperature control system protection design will automatically reduce the brightness you just need to open the gear again, can still restore the brightness. This is a normal phenomenon, please feel free to use. How long does the key light last? Fully charged use time. Three lights at the same time: can be used for about 3 hours. Double-sided COB at the same time: can be used for about 4-5 hours. Single side COB light: can be used for about 9-10 hours. Center XPE lighting: can be used for about 9-10 hours Applicable scenes: Night traveling/walking the dog/finding things at night/power outage emergency/car troubleshooting/camping, etc. Features 1. The body of this flashlight is built of high quality ABS material, and it has a very solid construction 2. Internal wiring applies the high efficient booster circuit, and can utilize the batteries in the largest extent 3. Excellent waterproof, suitable for outdoor environment, adverse weather conditions except for diving Specification: Product Name:INTENSE FLASHLIGHT Battery Type:Built in Lithium Battery Charging method: USB fast charging Material:ABS ❤Package description: 1*Flashlight 1*usb charging cable
3349725167.detail_html:
Specification:

【Lamp beads】: Double-sided C0B + XPG top light
【Product Size】:73*46*25mm
【Net Weight】:58g
【Material】:Aluminum alloy + PC
【Battery】: Built-in polymer battery 800mAh
【Charging mode】:Type-c fast charging
【Gear】:Left light on - right light on - top light on - three lights at the same time - three lights burst flash
【Features】: Top mountaineering buckle + bottle opener Bottom large strong magnet + standard bracket screws
【Waterproof grade】: IPX4
【Lumens】: Double light high brightness-1000LM
【Package Includes】: Keychain light + charging cable + color box

Why does the light become weak?
Key light working condition lasts about a few minutes after the intervention due to temperature control system protection design will automatically reduce the brightness you just need to open the gear again, can still restore the brightness. This is a normal phenomenon, please feel free to use.

How long does the key light last?


Fully charged use time.
Three lights at the same time: can be used for about 3 hours.
Double-sided COB at the same time: can be used for about 4-5 hours.
Single side COB light: can be used for about 9-10 hours.
Center XPE lighting: can be used for about 9-10 hours

Applicable scenes:
Night traveling/walking the dog/finding things at night/power outage emergency/car troubleshooting/camping, etc.

Features

1. The body of this flashlight is built of high quality ABS material, and it has a very solid construction

2. Internal wiring applies the high efficient booster circuit, and can utilize the batteries in the largest extent

3. Excellent waterproof, suitable for outdoor environment, adverse weather conditions except for diving

Specification:

Product Name:INTENSE FLASHLIGHT

Battery Type:Built in Lithium Battery

Charging method: USB fast charging

Material:ABS

❤Package description:

1*Flashlight

1*usb charging cable

aiTexts: This Mini LED Flashlight delivers 1000 lumens of bright, clear illumination using energy-efficient LED technology.
USB rechargeable with COB work lights, it offers long-lasting performance for outdoor activities.
IPX4 waterproof rating ensures durability and reliable use in wet conditions.
Compact keychain design makes it easy to carry for camping, hiking, or emergency situations.
CE certified for safety, combining convenience and robust functionality in a portable light source.

3495465368.title: WRELS Foldable Running Sports Soft Water Bottle Outdoor Hiking Mountaineering Camping #SH03-BLACK
3495465368.detail_text: The WRELS Foldable Running Sports Soft Water Bottle (Model: #SH03-BLACK) is a portable collapsible water bottle designed specifically for outdoor sports, suitable for hiking, mountaineering, camping, marathons, and other activities. Here are its key features: Lightweight Foldable Design Made of highly elastic silicone, it can be compressed and folded. When unfolded, it has a moderate capacity (standard capacity 250-500ml), and when folded, it is compact and easy to store, suitable for backpacks or waist packs. Versatile Application Supports high-intensity sports such as running, cycling, and trail running. The wide-mouth design allows for quick filling with water or adding ice. The bite spout ensures a smooth, leak-proof drinking experience, meeting the hydration needs during high-intensity activities. Durable and Safe Materials The soft, pressure-resistant, and wear-resistant silicone material can hold warm water (recommended temperature not exceeding 60℃). It meets food-grade safety standards, is odorless, easy to clean, and does not easily deform with long-term use. Ergonomic Details The transparent, curved design of the bottle body makes it easy to observe the water level. Some models are equipped with a lanyard or waist pack securing loop for convenient carrying; the non-slip texture enhances grip comfort and provides a more stable hold during exercise. Suitable for outdoor scenarios Lightweight design reduces weight, suitable for long-distance hiking or mountaineering; excellent sealing prevents leakage even when inverted or shaken, adaptable to complex terrain and weather conditions. Color: Pure Black (SH03-BLACK) Suitable for: Outdoor sports enthusiasts, trail runners, campers, and long-distance travelers. Note: Actual capacity and accessories may vary; please check the product details page for specifications before purchasing.

product.desc:
The WRELS Foldable Running Sports Soft Water Bottle (Model: #SH03-BLACK) is a portable collapsible water bottle designed specifically for outdoor sports, suitable for hiking, mountaineering, camping, marathons, and other activities. Here are its key features: Lightweight Foldable Design



Made of highly elastic silicone, it can be compressed and folded. When unfolded, it has a moderate capacity (standard capacity 250-500ml), and when folded, it is compact and easy to store, suitable for backpacks or waist packs. Versatile Application



Supports high-intensity sports such as running, cycling, and trail running. The wide-mouth design allows for quick filling with water or adding ice. The bite spout ensures a smooth, leak-proof drinking experience, meeting the hydration needs during high-intensity activities. Durable and Safe Materials



The soft, pressure-resistant, and wear-resistant silicone material can hold warm water (recommended temperature not exceeding 60℃). It meets food-grade safety standards, is odorless, easy to clean, and does not easily deform with long-term use. Ergonomic Details



The transparent, curved design of the bottle body makes it easy to observe the water level. Some models are equipped with a lanyard or waist pack securing loop for convenient carrying; the non-slip texture enhances grip comfort and provides a more stable hold during exercise. Suitable for outdoor scenarios



Lightweight design reduces weight, suitable for long-distance hiking or mountaineering; excellent sealing prevents leakage even when inverted or shaken, adaptable to complex terrain and weather conditions. Color: Pure Black (SH03-BLACK)



Suitable for: Outdoor sports enthusiasts, trail runners, campers, and long-distance travelers. Note: Actual capacity and accessories may vary; please check the product details page for specifications before purchasing.

page_json.category: Sports & Outdoors Activities Equipment > Sports Accessories
page_json.description: WRELS Silicone. The WRELS Foldable Running Sports Soft Water Bottle Model: SH03-BLACK is a portable collapsible water bottle designed specifically for outdoor sports, suitable for hiking, mountaineering, camping, marathons, and other activities. Here are its key features: Lightweight Foldable Design. Made of highly elastic silicone, it can be compressed and folded. When unfolded, it has a moderate capacity standard capacity 250-500ml), and when folded, it is compact and easy to store, suitable for backpacks or waist packs. Versatile Application. Supports high-intensity sports such as running, cycling, and trail running. The wide-mouth design allows for quick filling with water or adding ice. The bite spout ensures a smooth, leak-proof drinking experience, meeting the hydration needs during high-intensity activities. Durable and Safe Materials. The soft, pressure-resistant, and wear-resistant silicone material can hold warm water recommended temperature not exceeding 60. It meets food-g

aiTexts: This LINKENER Waterproof Summer Bucket Hat combines functionality and style with a 7 cm brim for effective sun protection.
Made from quick-drying, waterproof polyester, it offers anti-UV protection, ideal for outdoor activities like camping, hiking, and mountaineering.
Adjustable cap circumference (55-60 cm) ensures a comfortable fit for adults, and the lightweight, foldable design makes it easy to carry.
Includes a convenient storage bag and features a skin-friendly, breathable fabric for all-day comfort.

3562028098.detail_text: They can be folded into a very small object and placed in waist bags, chest bags, backpacks, almost anywhere. Features: Lightweight and compact foldable soft bottle, easy to use, store, and carry. Soft bite valve, high flower rate, wide mouth, convenient to drink. Suitable for outdoor activities such as running, walking, cycling, and mountaineering. Specifications: Material: TPU Color: Blue，Pink，Aqua blue Capacity: 150ml/250ml/500ml (optional) Water temperature: 0-40 ° C

3493846165.detail_text: Description They can be folded into a very small object and placed in waist bags, chest bags, backpacks, almost anywhere. Features: Lightweight and compact foldable soft bottle, easy to use, store, and cary. Soft mouth valve, high flower rate, wide mouth, easy to drink. Made of antibacterial TPU (thermoplastic polyurethane), it has excellent durbilty and flxibility. Reusable, free of bisphenol A and PVC. Wide mouth design, easy to add water, can hold ice cubes. Suitable for outdoor activities such as running, walking, cycling, and hiking. Specifications: Texture of material: TPU Color:Green Capacity: 300m/500m/700ml (optional) Water temperature: 0-40。C

1323698473.title: [ SG Local Seller ] Outdoor Thermal Sleeping Bag ★ Camping & Hiking ★ Envelope Hooded Travel use ★ Keep Warm
1323698473.detail_text: This sleeping bag has been manufactured with quality fibers to make sure that the user has complete comfort from its external environment, it is very suited for any outdoor activities and environments especially in the tropical climate where it gets very cold at night. This lightweight yet competent sleeping bag provides users adequate warmth when the bag has been zipped up. Being multi-functional, this sleeping bag can also act as a simple mattress or a blanket reconstructable according to the needs of the user. Suitable for both indoor & outdoor use! Features - Suitable for local Singapore climate - Hooded Sleeping Bag With Drawstrings - 180 x 75 cm + 30cm hood - Approxi 950g - Multi-Functional (Mattress or Blanket) - Quality Fibers - Lightweight & Portable - Zips & Drawstrings (Provides Greater Utility & Functionality) - Great for both Indoor & Outdoor Use

product.desc:
This sleeping bag has been manufactured with quality fibers to make sure that the user has complete comfort from its external environment, it is very suited for any outdoor activities and environments especially in the tropical climate where it gets very cold at night. This lightweight yet competent sleeping bag provides users adequate warmth when the bag has been zipped up. Being multi-functional, this sleeping bag can also act as a simple mattress or a blanket reconstructable according to the needs of the user. Suitable for both indoor & outdoor use!











Features

- Suitable for local Singapore climate

- Hooded Sleeping Bag With Drawstrings

- 180 x 75 cm + 30cm hood

- Approxi 950g



- Multi-Functional (Mattress or Blanket)



- Quality Fibers



- Lightweight & Portable



- Zips & Drawstrings (Provides Greater Utility & Functionality)



- Great for both Indoor & Outdoor Use
product.highlights:
• 210cm by 75cm.
  • Head rest approximately 30cm
  • Net weight 900g
  • Easy deploy and easy packed back into pouch
  • Material: 170t warming
  • The unique bottom zipper design makes it convenient to unzip the bottom to walk around freely and stretch your hands out for reading.
  • Perfect for camping, family leisure, and office use.
  • Cotton stuffing is lightweight, soft and breathable allows you to feel like you’re sleeping on a cloud.
  • You’ll stay toasty all night long even on cold nights
  • The top-of-the-line 170T polyester shell keeps heat in and moisture out.
  • When packing for an outdoor adventure, saving space is crucial.
  • Simply stash the sleeping bag in the included carrying bag for quick and compact storage.

aiTexts: This tactical sports backpack is designed for outdoor enthusiasts engaged in trekking, fishing, hunting, camping, and hiking.
Material: Made from durable, waterproof 1000D nylon for all-weather protection and long-lasting use.
Fit & Style: Available in two capacity options, 25L and 50L, featuring a rugged tactical design with MOLLE system for modular attachments.
Design Details: Includes multi-layer internal compartments and numerous pockets for organized storage and easy access to gear.
Usage Scenarios: Ideal for users needing spacious, highly organized backpacks with versatile color choices including camouflage, army green, black, red, blue, pink, and white.
Durability & Functionality: Reinforced with sturdy stitching and robust materials to endure demanding outdoor conditions.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
The 50L backpack can accommodate a maximum 17.3-inch laptop, while the 25-liter backpack can hold a maximum 13-inch laptop.
Note to wholesalers:
1: we are a factory for more than 6 years, accept a small amount of customized models, or customized logos,
2: We offer Dropshipping, will not put any invoices and promotional documents. More than 95% within 12 hours have the tracking code and update tracking info within 48 hours (excluding holidays)
3: if you are a wholesaler, please feel free to contact us. We will do our best to help you solve the problem.
4: if you are Dropshipping, please do not hesitate to distribute our products, please contact us, we can offer videos, pictures.

13675737127.detail_text: TOMSHOO Portable Mini Aluminum Alloy Alcohol Stove with Lid Outdoor Camping Hiking Backpacking Cooking Stove Feature: 1. Super light aluminum alloy construction. 2. Tiny holes on the top increase the efficiency of alcohol use. 3. Mini size easily fits in any pocket or backpack. 4. Comes with a lid to extinguish the fire when necessary. 5. Perfect for outdoor camping, hiking, backpacking, etc. Specification: Alcohol Stove: Material: Aluminum alloy Color: Black / Silver (optional) Outer Dimension: 70 * 52mm / 2.8 * 2.0in Inner Dimension: 35 * 50mm / 1.4 * 2.0in Weight: 33g / 1.2oz Windscreen: Material: Stainless steel Single Plate Size: 13.5 * 6.5cm / 5.3 * 2.6in Assembled Dimension: Approx. 10.5 * 6.5cm / 4.1 * 2.6in (D * H) Total Weight: Approx. 42g / 1.5oz Package List: 1 * Alcohol Stove 1 * Windscreen or 1 * Alcohol Stove

1. Super light aluminum alloy construction.
